Who We Are
20+ Years in
Business

Built on Wood.
Built on Trust.

Al Madhi Carpentry is a licensed wooden pallet manufacturer based in Al Sajaa Industrial Area, Sharjah. Since 2003, we have supplied warehouses, logistics firms, factories, and exporters across the UAE with reliable, durable pallets.

We specialise in both new pallets — crafted from fresh timber — and quality used pallets at competitive prices. Custom sizes are also available to your exact specification.

📋
Government of Sharjah — SEDD Licensed
Government Licensed & Registered — Sharjah, UAE
New Pallets Used Pallets Custom Sizes Bulk Orders UAE Delivery Heat Treated (HT) ISPM-15 Certified Fast Turnaround
Our Products

Wooden Pallets — All Sizes

We supply new and used wooden pallets across UAE. Choose from a wide range of standard sizes or order custom-built to your requirements.

New Pallets

Our new pallets are manufactured from fresh, quality timber — either fresh wood or responsibly sourced used wood processed to new standard. Each pallet is built to be strong, consistent, and ready for heavy industrial use.

  • Made from quality timber (pine / hardwood)
  • Consistent dimensions and load ratings
  • Available heat treated (HT) for export — ISPM-15
  • 2-way and 4-way entry options
  • Bulk pricing available on large orders
Standard Sizes — New Pallets
Euro Pallet (EUR/EPAL)
1200 × 800 mm
Most widely used in UAE & Middle East. 4-way entry, fits standard racking.
Best Seller
Industrial ISO Pallet
1200 × 1000 mm
Heavy industrial and chemical sector standard. Robust 4-way entry construction.
ISO 6780
GMA Pallet (US Standard)
1219 × 1016 mm
Grocery Manufacturers Association standard. Ideal for international export shipments.
Export Ready
Square / Jumbo Pallet
1200 × 1200 mm
Maximum load capacity. Heavy-duty construction for dense industrial cargo.
High Load
Flat / Asia-Pacific Pallet
1100 × 1100 mm
Common in Asia-Pacific supply chains. Low profile, smooth top deck, 4-way entry.
Asia Standard
Half Pallet
800 × 600 mm
Half the footprint of Euro pallet. Ideal for retail display and confined storage.
Retail Use
Quarter Pallet
600 × 400 mm
Point-of-sale and promotional display use. Lightweight and easy to manoeuvre.
Display Use
Heat Treated Export Pallet
Any Size
ISPM-15 certified. Approved for export to USA, EU, Australia and all major markets.
ISPM-15
Custom / Bespoke Size
Your Dimensions
Any length × width × height. Contact us with your exact requirements for a quote.
Made to Order
All sizes are indicative. Tolerances may apply. Contact us for exact specifications, load ratings, and pricing.
Used Pallets

Our used pallets are sourced, inspected, and sorted to ensure they are structurally sound and fit for purpose. An excellent cost-effective solution for internal warehouse use, storage, and non-export logistics.

  • Inspected and sorted — structurally sound
  • Significantly lower cost than new pallets
  • Ideal for internal warehousing and storage
  • Graded A and B quality available
  • Available in standard Euro and industrial sizes
  • Good for short-distance local logistics
Note: Used pallets are not recommended for international export. For export shipments, we recommend our new ISPM-15 heat treated pallets.
Available Sizes — Used Pallets
Euro Pallet — Used
1200 × 800 mm
Most common used pallet. Graded A (near new) or B (light wear). Sound structure.
Most Available
Industrial Pallet — Used
1200 × 1000 mm
Heavy industrial size in used condition. Inspected for structural integrity.
Grade A/B
Jumbo Pallet — Used
1200 × 1200 mm
Used square pallets for heavy load internal storage. Good for factory floors.
Subject to Stock
Mixed / Other Sizes — Used
Various
Various used pallet sizes available subject to current stock. Contact us to check availability.
Stock Varies
Used pallet stock changes frequently. Call or WhatsApp us to check current availability and pricing.
Custom / Bespoke

Don't see the size or spec you need? We manufacture pallets to your exact requirements — any dimension, load rating, wood type, or entry style. Just tell us what you need.

  • Any dimension: length × width × height
  • Choice of pine, hardwood, or mixed timber
  • 2-way or 4-way entry
  • Solid deck, slatted, or flat bed style
  • Heat treated (HT/ISPM-15) options available
  • Logo / brand stamping available on request
WhatsApp for Custom Quote →
To get a custom quote: contact us with your required dimensions, quantity, and any special requirements. We'll get back to you promptly.
Our Process

How We Make
Our Pallets

Every pallet is crafted by hand in our Al Sajaa workshop using professional-grade woodworking tools. We cut, assemble, and nail with precision to ensure every pallet is square, solid, and built to last.

🪚
Hand Saw
For accurate manual cuts, trimming ends and fine adjustments on individual boards.
⚡
Circular Saw
High-speed rotary blade for fast, straight cross-cuts across pallet boards.
📏
Band Saw
Used for ripping timber to width and making clean longitudinal cuts on stringers.
🔲
Straight Aluminium Cutting Blades
Precision guide blades for perfectly straight, consistent cuts across all boards.
🔩
Coil Nail Gun
Pneumatic coil nail gun with coil nails — for fast, strong, and consistent fastening of all pallet components.
